summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that WY is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $23.83. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 27.3%. The asset has recently tested this support 3 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $25.04 and a significant trendline confluence around $24.99 (formed by 3 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
